full_text:
Liu Ji 劉輯
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Ji (劉輯)was born in Zhuo county, Zhuo commandery. Initially a marquis, he became prince when his nephew died. Liu Ji was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom.
